creator: bsd@orsolic.org
text:
It seems that drm610 (built from ports) will survive for few days without crash, but then there will be freezings every few minutes for 5-10 seconds - music will mostly play, mouse pointer will be on screen, but typing in xterm or anything else is impossible.

Rebuilt /usr/src (14.2-p2), rebuilt drm (drm-515-kmod-5.15.160.1402000_3) from ports.
After playing YouTube in Firefox, mounting ZFS encrypted pool and running file intensive operation on that pool I was able to crash system in 2 minutes (same page fault).
Nothing in logs, sometimes the whole machine over network will be unresponsible (ping will be 25+ seconds), sometimes, when switching virtual desktop, freezing will be in minutes (up to 6 is personal record)
